capabilities: Develop a comprehensive evaluation strategy to ensure the integrity and reliability of knowledge graphs by integrating agent planning derived knowledge bases.

procedure.action: Capture knowledge graph specifications using SPARQL queries to extract schema and data relationships.
Assert specifications against domain ontologies using SHACL to ensure compliance and detect anomalies.
Inject criteria and metrics by defining precision, recall, and F1 score thresholds for knowledge graph updates.

Assert procedure output by running test queries and comparing results against expected outcomes using a benchmark dataset by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Invoke continuous monitoring with Prometheus to track changes and alert on deviations from expected metrics following the specified pattern; write a unit test covering the primary code path; assert test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete.

summary: Establish a robust evaluation framework to measure and mitigate knowledge poisoning in knowledge graphs, integrating agent planning knowledge bases for enhanced accuracy and reliability.
title: Mitigating Knowledge Poisoning in Knowledge Graphs

failureConditions: Inaccurate data relationships lead to incorrect knowledge graph updates; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Failure to detect anomalies results in persistent knowledge poisoning.

Lack of monitoring causes undetected deviations from expected metrics; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: specifications against domain ontologies using SHACL to ensure compliance and detect anomalies
procedure output by running test queries and comparing results against expected outcomes using a benchmark dataset by as
test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete
successConditions: Run SHACL validation and confirm zero critical violations; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Achieve precision and recall above 90% in test queries; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure alerts trigger within 5 minutes of metric deviations; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
